message:
fix: rename LockError::PolledAfterCompletion to Cancelled across all crates

Follow upstream asupersync::sync::LockError variant rename from
PolledAfterCompletion to Cancelled. Update all match arms in:
- frankensearch-embed: map_lock_error (1 occurrence)
- frankensearch-lexical: delete, index, batch_index, commit handlers
  (4 occurrences)
- frankensearch-rerank: map_lock_error (1 occurrence)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
